# ImageFree — Free Online Image Editing Suite

> Remove backgrounds with AI, resize images, apply filters, blur backgrounds, and more. Free, no signup, works in your browser.

## Docs
- API Documentation: https://image-free.com/free-api-documentation
- Background Removal: https://image-free.com/free-remove-background
- Image Resizer: https://image-free.com/free-resize-image
- Image Filters: https://image-free.com/free-image-filter
- Background Blur: https://image-free.com/free-background-blur
- Selfie Filters: https://image-free.com/free-selfie-filter
- OCR Converter: https://image-free.com/free-image-to-text-ocr-converter
- Image Uploader: https://image-free.com/free-image-uploader
- Online Camera: https://image-free.com/free-online-camera

## About
ImageFree is a free online image editing toolkit offering AI-powered background removal, image resizing, filter effects, background blur, selfie filters, OCR text extraction, image uploading, and a webcam camera with real-time filters. All tools work in the browser with no software installation required.

## Features
- AI Background Removal — Remove image backgrounds using deep learning (silueta model). Replace with solid colors, gradients, custom images, or text overlays.
- Image Resizer — Resize photos with preset sizes or custom dimensions. Aspect ratio lock supported. Output up to 10000×10000 pixels.
- Image Filter Editor — Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, grayscale, sepia, blur, and hue. One-click download.
- Background Blur — AI subject detection with adjustable blur intensity for portrait mode effects.
- Selfie Filter Presets — Glow, warm, vintage, B&W, soft glam, vivid, cool, dramatic presets.
- OCR Text Extraction — Tesseract.js-powered image to text conversion in the browser.
- Image Uploader — Drag-and-drop upload with instant shareable URLs.
- Online Camera — Webcam capture with 16 real-time filter presets.
- REST API — Programmatic access to all image processing features with JWT authentication.

## Facts
- All tools are free to use
- No signup required for basic features
- Images processed client-side or server-side with privacy
- Supports JPG, PNG, WebP formats (max 20 MB)
- Built with Node.js, Express, Jimp, and Python (rembg)
- Deployed on Vercel
